name_en: Model: CH191 Coach HANNA Series. Full of sophistication and exquisite craftsmanship details! The side oil-edge pleated design gives the silhouette a soft yet structured look. The capacity is undeniable, continuing the large-capacity functionality of the traditional bucket bag. Two detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. The entire bag features Monogram PVC material, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.
name_cn:
Model: CH191 Coach HANNA Series. Full of sophistication and exquisite craftsmanship details! The side oil-edge pleated design gives the silhouette a soft yet structured look. The entire bag features Monogram PVC material, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.
Dimensions: 23.5*22*11
